---
title: "Referência"
---

## Tools disponíveis

- `normalize_argument`
- `nl_parse_logic`
- `detect_ambiguities`
- `check_consistency`
- `check_entailment`
- `find_counterexample`
- `explain_formalization`

## Resources disponíveis

- `logic://schemas/ast-v1`
- `logic://examples/propositional`
- `logic://examples/fol`
- `logic://guides/ambiguity-taxonomy`

## Prompts disponíveis

- `formalize_argument`
- `teach_logic_step_by_step`
- `review_formalization`
